examples: The film ends, as it begins with a recitation of the Desiderata.
The sample solution completely fulfills the four desiderata I listed at the beginning of this article
Of course, the two have seldom been more closely linked, health, diet and safety having replaced faith, hope and charity as the desiderata of the virtuous life.
If is the kind of poem you find in the Wal-Mart poster bins along with Desiderata.
